productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Jacket
description: Composition Black sleeveless puffer jacket with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester and trim fabric made of 97% polyester and 3% elastane, has a mock neck, zippered front placket, two pockets on either sides and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This polyester puffer jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and a bright tee, or wear unzipped with a monochrome tee and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
